name: Dhanya Chatni (Fresh Coriander Chutney)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Coriander stems & leaves - washed, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine lemon juice, water and 1/2 cup coriander in a blender; blend at high for 30 seconds until pureed.
2. Scrape the sides of the blender, then add another 1/2 cup coriander. Repeat blending until all the coriander has been pureed.
3. Add coconut, onions, ginger, chili, sugar, salt and pepper to the blender. Blend again.
4. When the mixture is perfectly smooth, taste and adjust the seasoning by adding more sugar or salt if desired.
5. Serve immediately or keep tightly covered in the refrigerator for up to 1 week.
